generated_oml:
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first axis with integrated gear transmissions"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC system that manages robot axes through precise motion control and real-time feedback"
]

instance PrimaryPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "primary position encoder mounted directly on the motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PrimaryPositionEncoderData
]

instance SecondaryPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "secondary position encoder positioned behind the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryPositionEncoderData
]

instance PrimaryPositionEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PrimaryPositionEncoder
    base:desc "time series position data streamed via MQTT protocol"
]

instance SecondaryPositionEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryPositionEncoder
    base:desc "time series position data streamed via MQTT protocol"
]

instance SysMLGeometricStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML for geometric structural modeling via Internal Block Diagrams (IBDs)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance SysMLBehavioralStateMachineModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "behavioral modeling using state machines (SysML v1.7)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance MontiArcAutomatonModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "behavioral modeling using MontiArc Automaton"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcADLEnabler
]

instance SimulinkAnalyticalSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "analytical simulations via MathWorks Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance ContextualPhysicalSystemTracesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "contextual physical system traces aggregated for specific purposes"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PrimaryPositionEncoderData, SecondaryPositionEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler, MontiArcADLEnabler, SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for multi-level abstraction modeling (requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, product/technical layer)"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance RFLPMethodologyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RFLP methodology for addressing system complexity"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance OOSEMMethodologyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OOSEM methodology for addressing system complexity"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance SPESMethodologyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SPES methodology for addressing system complexity"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance SMArDTMethodologyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SMArDT methodology for addressing system complexity"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance ACMEADLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACME Architecture Description Language defining component & connector perspectives, interfaces, interconnections, and composition"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance AADLADLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL Architecture Description Language defining component & connector perspectives, interfaces, interconnections, and composition"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance MontiArcADLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Architecture Description Language defining component & connector perspectives, interfaces, interconnections, and composition"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for analytical simulations and integration with other simulation tools"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance CppCodeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ code implementation for detailed system implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance JavaCodeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java code implementation for detailed system implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "real-time visualization services via an interactive dashboard for operational monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalMonitoringInsight
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "advanced friction model identification capabilities (both white-box and black-box) to enhance predictive maintenance and system optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossDerivationInsight
]

instance OperationalMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "real-time analytics and user interaction through dashboard visualizations for monitoring and intervention"
]

instance FrictionLossDerivationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "friction loss derivation through physical relationship analysis to improve robot control accuracy"
]

instance MABIMAX100RobotSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "serial robot MABI MAX 100 in industrial manufacturing environments"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCSystem, PrimaryPositionEncoder, SecondaryPositionEncoder
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is validated through comparison of simulated data versus measured data to quantify deviations, with sensor arrangements reducing backlash and positional uncertainty. Continuous improvement of both white-box and black-box friction models enhances accuracy and minimizes prediction errors."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for transmitting time-series sensor data. Network topology, bandwidth requirements, latency, reliability mechanisms, redundancy strategies, and security protocols are not specified in the provided documents."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard for digital twin interoperability and the SysML modeling language for systems engineering, ensuring adherence to industry specifications for data exchange and model integration."
]
